banner.title: BitVoy Affiliate Program
banner.desc: Earn rewards by introducing BitVoy services and Membership.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: The BitVoy Affiliate Program is a system where you can earn rewards by introducing BitVoy services and Membership. Even if you're not familiar with cryptocurrencies or NFTs, sharing BitVoy's philosophy and experience can lead to valuable referrals.

notInvestment.title: ✓ Not an investment or MLM
items: No guaranteed returns or profit promises
Not a pyramid scheme or investment model

sustainable.title: ✓ Sustainable long-term
items: Referral value grows with BitVoy's growth

whatToRefer.title: What to Refer?
targets: Various services provided or partnered by BitVoy

importantPoint.title: Important Referral Point
importantPoint.note: Please introduce it as a guide to Membership participation, not as 'selling' NFTs.

rewardSystem.title: How Rewards Are Generated
flow: Use or purchase of target services
rewardSystem.note: ※ Reward conditions and targets may change.

membershipAffiliate.title: Membership × Affiliate Relationship
benefits: Affiliate reward rates may be boosted
Access to exclusive campaigns may be granted
membershipAffiliate.note: 👉 The more you participate in Membership as a referrer, the more advantageous it becomes

ok.title: OK Explanations
examples: "BitVoy is a new wallet service that works instantly without requiring an app"
"Founder NFT is like a participation certificate"
"The more you use it, the more benefits expand"

ng.title: NG Explanations (Prohibited)
examples: "It makes money" / "It will increase in value"
ng.note: 👉 Expressions that cause misunderstanding are prohibited.

rewardReceipt.title: About Receiving Rewards
points: Rewards are managed linked to your BitVoy account
Payment methods and currencies differ by campaign
Withdrawal and usage become available when certain conditions are met
rewardReceipt.note: ※ Details can be confirmed in the management screen.

targetAudience.title: Who This Is For
audiences: Those who like to introduce next-generation wallets and new payment services
Those who want to support long-term services
Those who want to introduce based on experience, even without knowledge

q1.q: Q. Are there any initial costs?

q2.q: Q. Can I refer without joining Membership?
q2.a: A. Yes, it's possible. However, participating in Membership may increase benefits.

q3.q: Q. Can I refer to people who don't have an account?
q3.a: A. Of course it's possible. Please guide them as a way to participate in Membership.

conclusion.title: Finally
conclusion.body: The BitVoy Affiliate Program is a system that values 'spreaders' rather than 'sellers'. Please share BitVoy's worldview and experience in your own words.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Important Notes (Required Display)
points: This program is not an investment product
It does not guarantee profits or results
Terms and conditions may change without notice
